entries.title: System Health Check
entries.content:
## Status Overview

- **Gateway**: ✅ Running (PID 447601)
- **The Hub**: ✅ Healthy (v2.0.0)
- **XRP Bot**: ⚠️ Paper trading via cron (no dedicated process)

## Details

- Status: OK

### Yggdrasil Hub

- Health: OK
- Version: 2.0.0

### XRP Trading Bot
- Strategy: thor_xrp_mc_v2 (paper trading)
- Exchange: Pionex
- Last Balance: $199.07 (142.19 XRP @ $1.40)
- Circuit Breaker: Active
- Note: No dedicated process found - appears to run via scheduled tasks
